title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama: chat, embed, pull, list models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python lib.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embedding provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, multi-model, RAG, admin panel).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API; supports chat, embed, pull, delete.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich interactive CLI for Ollama with syntax highlighting, history, and fuzzy search.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement inside VS Code.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset to use Ollama models in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: FastAPI chatbot, Next.js copilot, GPU offloading, function calling, etc.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official registry of Modelfile recipes (Llama 3, Phi-3, CodeGemma, …) plus community contributions.

title: ollama-gpt4all
summary: Bridge to import GPT4All models into Ollama format with one command.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for private or shared channel inference.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to spin up ephemeral Ollama services in CI pipelines for LLM-based tests.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing Ollama binary, CUDA support, and NixOS module with systemd service.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate with async/tokio client for Ollama; includes Axum example microservice.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter that exposes an OpenAI-compatible REST endpoint backed by Ollama.
